title: Animal Brush
description: A vanilla-friendly tool to reroll animal skin variants with a simple right-click. Preserve NBT data while cycling through all available variants for 13+ animal types!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/drrAQLwE68k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Tired of breeding dozens of animals to get the perfect color?** Animal Brush is here to help! This lightweight, vanilla-friendly mod adds a simple tool that lets you reroll animal skin variants with a single right-click.

✨ Features
----------

*   **🎨 Reroll Variants**: Right-click any supported animal to cycle through all available skin variants
*   **💾 NBT Preservation**: Keeps custom names, equipment, and all entity data intact
*   **🎭 13+ Animals Supported**: Works with Cats, Horses, Llamas, Foxes, Rabbits, Axolotls, Frogs, Wolves, Pandas, Chickens, Cows, Pigs, and more!
*   **💫 Visual Feedback**: Particles appear on successful variant changes
*   **⚖️ Balanced Gameplay**: Limited durability (20 uses) keeps it fair
*   **🌐 Multiplayer Ready**: Full server compatibility with proper synchronization

🐾 Supported Animals
--------------------

**Minecraft 1.19.4 - 1.20.1**

*   **Cat** - 11 variants
*   **Horse** - 7 colors × 5 markings = 35 variants
*   **Llama** - 4 variants
*   **Parrot** - 5 variants
*   **Rabbit** - 6 variants (+ Toast Easter egg)
*   **Fox** - 2 variants (Red, Snow)

**Minecraft 1.20.2+**

All previous + **Axolotl** (5 variants), **Frog** (3 variants)

**Minecraft 1.20.5+**

All previous + **Wolf** (9 biome variants)

**Minecraft 1.21.5+ (Spring to Life Update)**

All previous + **Panda** (7 personality variants), **Chicken** (3 climate variants), **Cow** (3 climate variants), **Pig** (3 climate variants)

**Total: 13 animal types with 100+ variant combinations!**

🎨 Crafting Recipes
-------------------

**Modern Recipe (Minecraft 1.20+)**

When the vanilla brush exists:

![recipe-img](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_05b64f5c-7192-4d3d-98ac-ab99bafc1649.png)

**Ingredients:**

*   2× Amethyst Shard
*   1× Brush (vanilla)

**Legacy Recipe (Minecraft 1.19.4)**

Before the vanilla brush was added:

![legacy-recipe-img](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_630b3038-7547-4c5e-a3ee-b2f2c00444e7.png)

**Ingredients:**

*   2× Amethyst Shard
*   1× Stick
*   1× Copper Ingot
*   1× Feather

📖 How to Use
-------------

1.  **Craft** the Animal Brush (see recipes above)
2.  **Right-click** on any supported animal
3.  **Watch** the variant change with particles
4.  **Repeat** until you get the variant you want!

**Note:** The tool has 20 uses before breaking, just like the vanilla brush.

🔧 Technical Details
--------------------

*   **Multi-Loader Support**: Available for Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge
*   **Multi-Version**: Supports Minecraft 1.19.4 through 1.21.11
